summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF DECEPTION AND FALLEN ENTITIES: Brandon recounts visions concerning the great falling away, detailing an encounter with a transparent gold brooch featuring an alive, fiery emerald and massive diamonds. Brandon states this jewelry connects to a preserved bloodline of fallen angels and Nephilim, appearing as golden lizards, attached to royalty for a future disclosure. Brandon notes the revelation of hidden United States government files and three upcoming levels of deception, with the moderate level shaking nations and the severe level being highly deceptive.

HEAVENLY PLACES AND DEMONIC REALMS: Brandon describes seeing a dimension situated between heaven, earth, and hell where Satan rules over principalities and spiritual hosts of wickedness. Brandon details observing a demonic throne surrounded by fallen angels with dingy golden colors and hairy, black-and-white appearances resembling creatures from Star Wars. Brandon states this realm features breathing portals layered with light leading to different dimensions, and a room filled with fiery emerald stones perched on granite that emit a powerful, drawing light. Brandon warns that Satan transforms into an angel of light to deceive nations, operating through false prophetic voices who will perform demonic signs, wonders, and miracles while preaching a compromised gospel.

GLOBAL SYSTEMS AND BEAST TECHNOLOGIES: Brandon details global shifts, including King Charles implementing a digital ID system in England to modernize public services, linking this to the mark of the beast. Brandon foresees the king's grandson, George, becoming highly vocal with a deceptive glow. Brandon mentions President Trump visiting China to make agreements, alongside the Senate passing the Crypto Clarity Act with a 15 to 9 vote. Brandon identifies this legislation and cryptocurrency as part of a beast system, recounting a vision of Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin, as a faceless figure wearing a black cloak.

ASTEROID IMPACT AND AVIATION HALT: Brandon shares a warning about an impending asteroid or meteor impact, specifically mentioning the newly discovered asteroid 2026 JH2. Brandon outlines a period of accelerated signs between April 1st and September 11th. Brandon details a specific day when all commercial flights will be grounded to prevent planes from being struck by atmospheric particles accompanying the rock. Brandon states the asteroid will strike the Atlantic Ocean, causing the water to boil, deafening explosions that sound like a thousand trains, shattered glass in homes, and people's ears bleeding from the noise.

NATIONAL SHAKINGS AND GOVERNMENTAL UPHEAVAL: Brandon forecasts the downfall of mega-churches in California and the East Coast. Brandon describes a vision of Grim Reaper hands with hanging moss and webbing clapping together over Seattle and plowing across America between May 25th and the 4th. Brandon predicts the upcoming United States elections will result in winning the House but losing the Senate to Democrats by three seats, emphasizing the importance of state governors like Kevin Stitt of Oklahoma. Brandon mentions a virus functioning as a trial run for a future release and details an underwater bomb discovered at a dam supplying drinking water to Mobile, Alabama, linking it to a Red Dawn-style infiltration of major cities.

INTELLIGENCE OPERATIONS AND INTERNATIONAL EVENTS: Brandon outlines the CIA raiding Tulsi Gabbard's office to seize JFK assassination and MK Ultra files while President Trump is out of the country. Brandon warns of a 25th Amendment coup resembling an intensified January 6th, involving a chameleon-like lizard figure blending into the White House. Brandon states Cuba will face a major shaking across its 700-mile length, linking CIA Director John Ratcliffe's visit to hidden files connected to the Kennedy curse, the Cuban Missile Crisis, and Fidel Castro. Brandon also predicts a great earthquake and shaking in British Columbia, Canada, a shaking in Japan, and upheaval in the Vatican. Brandon foresees agreements concerning the Strait of Hormuz involving Iran and China, while noting Trump will focus on domestic AI chip manufacturing to reduce reliance on Taiwan.

AMERICAN REVIVAL AND URBAN DESTRUCTION: Brandon sees a wave of patriotism and a rebirthing of the church in America, symbolized by a flag wrapped around a baby, echoing covenants made at Plymouth Rock. Brandon foresees the exposure of the Epstein list resulting in sudden deaths and mysterious groin infections as judgment for harming children. Brandon expects new revivalists to emerge, akin to Charles Finney and John Wesley. Brandon highlights anointing and potential in political figures like Marco Rubio, Byron Donalds, and JD Vance, while predicting the restoration of ancestral wealth stolen from African American slaves and Native Americans. Brandon concludes with visions of real fires in New York buildings and subways, a demonic figure projected on the Empire State Building alongside a Palestinian flag, and fiery holes appearing in the Statue of Liberty.
rawData: [May 14, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/P5YAnc70THI]-[Well, good afternoon, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to go over what we were shown in this last video. But first, Holy Spirit, I plead the blood of Jesus right now over this broadcast. I thank you, Father, over the internet signal that it doesn't drop or have any buffering for the people. Thank you, Father, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood of Jesus over our time of prayer today. And Father, as we pray for the nations, as we pray for a great harvest of souls to come to know you, Father, I thank you, Lord, that there's a covering over it and that you have your way. You are the potter, we are the clay. And we're so grateful, Father, for the time that we have to pray and to seek your face, and that we will know you more in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen. All right. Well, I'll just go over what I was shown this last time. Now, when I was looking at this, I'll bring these scriptures up because I paused because there was so much—I kept pleading the blood because it was very dark what I was seeing. It looked like a lot of evil. These visions were very detailed, very colorful. They were stuff I've never seen before concerning—Hey, bring up the scripture: principalities, powers, spiritual wickedness in Ephesians. Okay. All right. So this is the great falling away. And I believe what I was seeing was part of what the scripture talks about: the great falling away. This is 2 Thessalonians chapter 2, verses 1 and 3: 'Now, brethren, concerning the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ and our gathering together to him, we ask you not to be soon shaken in mind or troubled, neither by spirit or by word or by letter, as if from us, as though the day of Christ had come. Let no one deceive you by any means. For that day will not come unless the falling away comes first, and the man of sin is revealed, the son of perdition.' So I saw the falling away. I saw—and this is what's so interesting to me as we were praying, and I'll start with this: I was looking into Memorial Day and the Lord allowed me to see the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier. Praying over the Memorial Day weekend, which is in two weeks, and then I was taken to the 250th anniversary. Praying over the window between Memorial Day and the 250th. As I was shown France, I was looking at France and I was looking at gifts. I was looking at countries honoring America for the 250th to President Trump. But I was looking at some kind—and the Lord said this is a metaphor, a type and shadow. I saw jewels. I saw these jewels that looked like they were alive. There were emeralds, but I saw this emerald that was the most beautiful emerald; it looked like a brooch that was in this gold that looked transparent. It had diamonds that were the size of your eyeball. Humongous diamonds that were all on a rope, and they were attached to this beautiful brooch that was transparent with an emerald that looked alive. It was on fire. There was something about this emerald, but it was drawing you in. It made you want to keep looking at it. It was the most beautiful emerald I've ever seen. It was not of this world. It was something very symbolic to these jewels that I was seeing. As I was looking at this, I saw a bloodline of fallen angels that looked like lizards—golden lizards—that were again something of the Nephilim. But the Nephilim were the fallen race that was crossbred with these fallen angels—the men that were crossbred with these angels. So, I was looking at a bloodline that was preserved and passed down from generation to generation for hundreds of years, attached to the kings and royalty, that they have preserved for a time of disclosure. I saw hidden secret files that were in the United States government that were about to be revealed. I saw levels of deception coming. In the days ahead, I saw that the 40 videos—these 40 different things—were just toying with you. They're messing with you. It's not real. The real disclosure what they're going to give you is not real disclosure. It's just messing with you. It's not like big news. It will be like, 'Okay, they give you these little tidbits.' But I saw a moderate and an extreme level of deception that's coming. There were three levels of deception coming. As this next level that's about to come out—that is moderate—will shake the nations. There's something very dark that they're about to reveal regarding what we were praying about that's moderate. The Lord called it moderate. But there is a severe level that is very deceptive. It is bad. As I was looking at this, I saw a golden pyramid. But the golden pyramid was attached to Satan. The Illuminati was attached to Satan. And as I was looking into this, I was taken to the second heaven, whatever you want to call it. It was a dimension. I've always thought Satan was in hell and he ruled in hell, and that's out of my ignorance. But he isn't in hell. I was looking at something where he has a kingdom that is above us, and it was in between heaven, earth, and hell, and that's where he ruled. I saw the principalities. Now look at this: 'For we do not wrestle against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual hosts of wickedness in the heavenly places.' The heavenly places. So the wickedness in heavenly places. Where is this? I saw a level of demonic beings that I never knew existed. You know, whenever we think of angels, I always look at the ones with the wings, and they have armor, and they've got the angelic beings that work on our behalf. But there was something of darkness that I was looking at that sucked me in. I was looking at it and it was so dark. I've never seen anything like that before in my life, and I had to keep pleading the blood because it was freaking me out. I did not tell you what I was seeing, but spiritual hosts of wickedness in heavenly places. There's a level of things that have never presented themselves to anybody that are above us, and spiritual wickedness in heavenly places that is over the top of something that I saw—that I had a glimpse of. There's a dimension. There is a realm. I don't know how else to say this. I'm trying with my human vocabulary to relay what I was shown, and I don't know how to. So that's why I said, 'How do I say—?' I'm trying to find scriptures. But it even talks about in Ezekiel, it talks about Satan and his stones. And there were stones that Satan had. Lucifer had these stones. And they were fiery. Braden can find that scripture; I'll read it to you. Of these stones that I was talking about—the emerald that was alive. It was bubbling. It looked like it had light. Now, I want to tell you this. Look at this: 'Satan comes as an angel of light.' Look at that one, 2 Corinthians 11. 'And no wonder, for Satan himself transforms himself into an angel of light.' 2 Corinthians 11:14. When I was looking at this light, when I was looking at the devil, I was looking at this—I don't want to call it the third heaven, so please don't sit there and go, 'Brandon, you're misquoting it wrong.' It's probably the second, whatever this is. I saw a realm—that's all I can tell you. I saw His throne; I saw His kingdom. And there were fallen angels all around this road that led to a throne. They were all dingy, golden-looking colors. Some of them looked like Chewbacca from Star Wars, but they were black and white colors, not red like Chewbacca. These things looked hairy. They looked like something out of a Star Wars movie. This was darkness like I've never seen before. These were alien, deity-looking things like I've never seen before. I want to call them the fallen ones; I don't know what else to call this. I want you to see this: Ezekiel 28:14-17. 'You were the anointed cherub who covers; I established you. You were on the holy mountain of God; you walked back and forth in the midst of the fiery stones. You were perfect in your ways from the day you were created till iniquity was found in you. By the abundance of your trading, you became filled with violence within and you sinned. Therefore I cast you as a profane thing out of the mountain of God and destroyed you, O covering cherub, from the midst of the fiery stones.' These are the stones I was looking at. They looked like they were on fire. I saw a room with these stones. They were like all kinds of different emeralds, and it was in a room that had caves leading to one major stone that looked like an oval. It was perched on a granite thing and it shined out like light. When I looked at it, it filled my spiritual eye so brightly, but it started to draw me in like a tractor beam, and I had to resist it because it was pulling me in and sucking me in. Chapter 2: Find scriptures to stand on. I didn't like it. The darkness that I was feeling was overwhelming, and that's why I ended it abruptly. I did not know what to do with what I was shown. Afterwards, I had to pray in the spirit for hours. It drew me in like a tractor beam. There was something so dark about this light that Satan was over. I want you to hear this: 'You walked back and forth in the midst of the fiery stones. You were perfect in your ways from the day you were created till iniquity was found in you.' These stones were beautiful—something I've never seen before. I saw two of them. It says 'stones'—there's more than one. I was shown two, and one of them was emerald. It had to do with the Nephilim. He comes as an angel of light and he will deceive the nations in the days ahead. 2 Corinthians 11:14: 'And no wonder, for Satan himself transforms himself into an angel of light.' Matthew 24:24: 'For false Christs and false prophets will rise and show great signs and wonders and deceive, if possible, even the elect.' He's going to come as an angel of light with these false prophetic voices and beings, and they will deceive the nations. You're going to see signs and wonders. The Lord warned me that in the days ahead there will be a darkness to deceive, and you'll see miracles flow from these prophetic people and churches that will present a false gospel—a gospel that has compromise, suggesting more than one way to heaven than Jesus Christ. They'll say, 'Well, we have to accept everything. Sin is okay; grace covers it.' You can live the way you want to live, basically. But they're going to show you signs and wonders, and people are going to get healed. But it's going to be demonic, powered by the devil himself to come as an angel of light to deceive you. You must be on guard and have discernment for what's about to be brought to the world. I'm trying to tell you what I saw, and the only way I know how is by bringing these scriptures out and telling you that you're going to have to be on guard. The Lord said you must know His Word more than you know your name. You've got to get that Bible down inside of your heart and make it a pillar and a foundation, for there's great deception coming. You're going to be looking at it and going, 'Well, did you not see that guy's arm grew out?' Everything he's preaching must be right because we've never seen miracles like that before. The dead were raised or whatever. I'm just trying to put this out to you so that you understand: false Christs and false prophets will rise and show great signs and wonders to deceive, if possible, even the elect. He's coming as an angel of light to deceive the nations. They're all going to like him and think he's awesome. But remember that you must have great discernment regarding what they're saying. There's only one way to the Father, and that's the Lord Jesus Christ. Muhammad can't save you; Buddha can't save you. No false god can save you. The only one that can save you is Jesus Christ. He died for you and rose again on the third day. If anybody else tells you there are other ways to the Father than Jesus, run. I don't care what they're prophesying or declaring or what miracles they're performing. If they're telling you there are other ways to the Father than Jesus, run. There's going to be many false Christs and many people telling you things in the days ahead. There's a great deception coming to the world, and you'd better have your eyes open. You'd better know this Bible more than just some YouTube person telling you a word. You'd better have a revelation of the Word yourself. Read the Bible. Don't trust anybody on YouTube if they try to go away from this. Read this; make this the foundation in your life. You're running out of time. It's not time to play church. There are many charismatic circles that are going to be exposed in the days ahead. There's going to be much darkness exposed. A lot of you just drink the Kool-Aid. You've got to find the Word for yourself. Mega-churches are about to go down. It's going to look like God is cleaning house in the days ahead. You're going to see it in California and on the East Coast. You're going to see people you've been listening to on YouTube and TV, and you're going to be like, 'Oh my gosh, my faith is so shaken,' because you didn't have a backbone like a crowbar in the beginning and you were fed porridge the whole time. You must learn the Word for yourself. You've got to get a backbone like a crowbar or you're going to be deceived. 'For false Christs and false prophets will rise and show you great signs and wonders to deceive, if possible, even the elect.' Who is He talking to? The elect. People who feel like they have some knowing, some backbone to them. I'm telling you, I saw Satan coming as an angel of light. And when I saw those stones, it sucked me in. I was looking at them, and the Lord said, "I'm allowing you to see this for a reason." There are levels of deception about to be revealed to the world to deceive the nations. And we're not just talking about the believers, ladies and gentlemen; I'm talking about the unbelievers. The Antichrist is going to rule for a reason, and he's going to be able to deceive the nations. They'll give over their kingdoms to him in one hour. That's what the Bible says. So, what other scripture did I tell you to pull up? Now, brethren, concerning the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ and our gathering together to him, we ask you not to be soon shaken in mind or troubled, either by spirit or by word or by letter, as if from us, as though the day of Christ had come. Let no one deceive you by any means, for the day will not come unless a falling away comes first and the man of sin is revealed, the son of perdition. So don't let anybody deceive you. A falling away is coming. Those are the things that I keep reading over and going over. I'm like, "Lord, what did you show me?" I saw this heaven, this dimension is what I want to call it. I saw portals, and they were alive and breathing. They looked like a face; it looked like it was alive, but it was layers of light, and you could go through them to different dimensions and places. I was trying to figure out what I was looking at. This wasn't in hell. I didn't see him in hell. He had a throne, a demonic throne. It looked like something like the stars—when you take pictures from NASA with the Hubble telescope, it looked like that. It looked like something out of this world. As I was seeing President Trump, I saw gifts. I saw an unveiling of what they have been waiting for because they're wanting the Mahdi to come. I saw things being exposed and cleansed, and they wanted some of this stuff to come out. I saw the King of England. Darkness is settling in. He will rise up as a scorpion in the days ahead, followed by his grandson George. George is not king. I said he will become very vocal in his latter years, around seventeen years old or whatever he was. I saw him as a young man, but he became very vocal and had a glow about him. You say, "Well, why do you say glow?" because it draws you in. It's not the Holy Ghost. His voice will become amplified. I did not see the father, but the young man was not king; his voice was like an ambassador. Now I want you to hear what the king says. He came to America two weeks ago, and I said things were shaken. There was a darkness on Trump's right shoulder as he stood next to him, and I said there was a cloaking of darkness and things were shaken under the table—what was said that you did not know. Watch what he says now. Are you going to listen and have ears to hear where we are in the end times? I said, "Watch England, watch the king, watch what happens in the days ahead." A great darkness is coming. And you know what's interesting? He has his crown on and his staff. Listen to what he says right here: "My ministers will also proceed with the introduction of digital ID that will modernize how citizens interact with public services." So, you're going to have to have a digital ID in England soon. They're going to modernize it, and you're not going to be able to have public services without it. They're getting you ready for the mark of the beast. The digital ID is about to be unfolded in England. What was said in America two weeks ago? China—he's there right now. President Trump is in China. What is being discussed? What agreements are being made? I said a shot in the arm in the economy is coming. Then the Senate committee passed the Crypto Clarity Act, 15 to 9. They're bringing it into the next phase. It passed today. What is attached to clarity? What is attached to crypto? A beast system. I went in the spirit, and the Lord allowed me to say this. He said, "Who is Satoshi Nakamoto?" He said, "I'll show you who he was. Who is the founder of Bitcoin?" He said, "I'm going to show you something. I'm never going to tell you what I saw about who he is, but the Lord said, 'I will allow you to see who this individual is.'" So I was allowed to see this, and it was nothing like I thought. Who is the creator of crypto? Who is the creator of Bitcoin? Who is the creator of all this? They were wearing a black cloak and had no face that I was allowed to tell you about. The Lord said something to me about the whole thing today; I was allowed to go into meetings and hear things. He said, "I want you to pray over this for what's coming. It's coming faster than it's ever come before." Brandon, the harvest of souls—the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. There are so many of you who do not realize where we are in this dispensation of grace, and it's coming to an end. The sun is setting on this dispensation of grace. Great tribulation is about to begin. Are you ready for the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ? Digital ID is about to come mainstream, and King Charles is declaring it over his people. Where are you with the signs of the times? Where's your heart right now? If you were to die today, where would you spend eternity? As I was looking at the stone, the fire, and what was described in Ezekiel, it shook me. I thought, "Man, Brandon's strong," but he comes as an angel of light. I had to take moments and pray because I thought I was strong with the Lord, but the devil will come to deceive the nations. The only way you're going to get through the days ahead is by leaning confidently in the Lord Jesus Christ. In between my sleep and my wake, the Lord gave me an asteroid name. I didn't know what it was, but he gave me the letters and numbers of an actual asteroid that they have, and he said, "They're not telling you about this." He gave me the exact number of something. He gave me the exact numbers of a rock they've named, and he said they know it's coming. I warned you what he said. He gave me the exact number; it had a dash and numbers. He said, "This one's going to hit the Earth." I want you to understand, I'm not trying to scare you; I'm trying to prepare you. They know something's coming. When I heard the name and he told it to me, he said, "Tell your wife this," because Diana's smarter than me—I don't understand what I'm looking at. When he gives me numbers and things, I go, "Okay." I gave it to her, and she studied it and said, "Brennan, you're freaking me out a little bit." I said, "Yeah, well, this is what the Lord said." He talked about an asteroid, this rock that's coming—I don't know if it's an asteroid or a meteor. He said it's coming, and it's coming sooner than you think. And he said, 'I warned you from April 1st to September 11th, 9/11, that a great acceleration of things was coming.' A great acceleration of signs in the heavens with these aliens—all this stuff they're unveiling, all this demonic stuff they're talking about. Okay. Then newly discovered asteroid 2026 JH2 is about to have a very close encounter with the Earth at a distance of just whatever AU. It's all this stuff they're talking about, finding these rocks. Okay. I saw the day this happens and they ground all the flights. I'm going to tell you this: I saw all the flights were grounded. They won't allow the planes to go up because of particles that were flying with it, and they were slightly behind it, worried about the planes falling down like you were shooting missiles at them. And there were so many little particles and so much stuff about to enter into our atmosphere that the flights were grounded for a whole day—all of them. And they wouldn't allow it because they didn't want them to be like skeet shooting. Does that make sense? skeet shooting. They didn't want the skeet shooting to be planes and they didn't want them to be struck from the top down. And I saw them grounding all the flights because metal is thin with a rock that's flying that fast. So they ground them all over the place. They would not let commercial jets fly this day. It was bad. All flights. It looked like there were no flights in the sky, like it was 9/11. I saw when this major rock hits, it hits in the water in the Atlantic Ocean again. I saw more, but it hits so deep and it hits the Earth's surface. It creates gases. It creates some kind of water to boil. It causes the water to cook. Again, I've seen it. This is something very serious when I was praying about it. And when I saw it coming, it busted all the glass out of the houses where it flew over that area and it sounded like a thousand trains. It was deafening. The Lord even showed me people's ears bleeding from the loudness of the explosion as it goes over your house. It causes great disturbance. This is what I saw yesterday—or what was it? What day was that? Yeah, it wasn't today. It had to be yesterday. I didn't make a video because I was upset about everything. So then we see all this new stuff. Everybody's sending me this stuff saying, 'Hey, Brandon, do you see this guy? You see this guy?' It goes with what the Lord is showing me. He's a young kid. He has a YouTube channel. He looks probably in his 30s. Everybody's talking about him. He does astronomy stuff. Diana said, 'Brandon, look at this,' and she showed me all the pictures of this guy talking about stuff, and we're about to enter into this belt or some kind of debris and all this stuff. He's a YouTuber, and so I don't know his name and... there you are. That's him. The young kid, Steven Burns. Yeah, Stephen who? Burns. Burns. Okay. Now he has a YouTube channel. And this was sent to Diana from some of you viewers. And you can't play it because I don't want him to strike my channel for playing his stuff. I don't know him. But he is talking about stuff out there that is being discovered. There's something about to happen is basically what he's saying. To make a long story short, it goes with what the Lord's warning me about. When? I don't know. I see in part, hear in part. If I got the whole thing, people would be looking at me. And it's not about Brandon Biggs. This is about Jesus. We attract to deflect. I point you to the cross. I point you to the Savior. I am Brandon. This isn't about Brandon and the Brandon show. This is about Jesus Christ and me telling you that it's time for you to repent and come to the saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ. And make it a heart thing because you're running out of time. This isn't about how important Brandon is, how much the channel's growing or whatever. It's about me telling you it's time for you to fall on your knees and repent before a holy God. You must get your heart right. You must get into the word. You must go to church. You must find Him. Seek Him daily. Not just on Sundays and when it's convenient. Christianity is not convenient. It's to die to self. It's not an easy walk, telling your flesh to shut up. But when you crucify your flesh and you seek Him daily, you will find Him and He will become real to you. Don't have compromise in your heart. Don't be lukewarm. Be all in for Jesus. Be those virgins that had their lamps full of oil. Don't be like the other five that were like, 'Well, we know He's coming.' But as they went to go find the oil because they did not prepare themselves for the bridegroom, He came when they were not there. And when they came back, it was too late. He came for the ones that were ready. He came for the ones whose lamps were full of oil. And when they say, 'Can we borrow some of yours?' they say, 'No. Are you kidding me? We've been sacrificing. We've been looking for Him. We know He's coming. We're expecting the unexpected. We're expecting for Jesus to come. Have your lamp full of oil. Stay under the spout where the glory comes out. Drink from the well that never runs dry. All these signs are happening all around us. But what are you doing with it? With the blood moons and the things we had in early 2014—the blood moons—and everybody was freaking out about the blood moons and John Hagee wrote books, everybody wrote books about the blood moons. But we seem, as a frog in a pot, we forget about the books. We forget about the warnings that we had 10 years ago. It's been 10 years plus, 11, 12 years some of it. But people become desensitized to the signs that are around us and we lay it aside and go, 'Well, you know, we heard about that. It was a big nothing.' But because you didn't see it when you thought it would happen with the comet and the star of Bethlehem—remember that big star? It was back in the early... what was that? 2000 during COVID, and we sat out in the parking lot because we couldn't go in anywhere. When was that, Braden? 2019, 2020? And we saw the big bright light in the sky in the west. Does anybody remember that? It was big bright planets that joined together and it formed this big bright light. It was Jupiter and I think something else, and everybody was freaking out, 'Oh my gosh, look at that.' And it was for days, but as time goes by, we go, 'Oh, well, I forgot about that. No big deal.' He said He would give us signs to warn us in Genesis. He told us. But there's so many of us that become desensitized to the signs. And as we see these meteors and these asteroids and plagues and pestilence and wars and rumors of wars and we see the falling away and the cleaning of the church, for judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. Don't become the ostrich with his head in the sand and be looking down and not looking up. It's time to repent before a holy God and come to Jesus before it's too late. The ark is closing, ladies and gentlemen. It's happening all around us. As the days of Noah, so will it be. Noah knew the flood was coming and he tried to warn everybody around him, but no one had ears to hear and they perished. I'm trying to warn you as in the days of Noah—here we are again. The Lord warned us, Jesus warned us in Matthew 24, as the day approaches. Here we are. It's happening all around us. Well, Brandon, what if it's another 10 years? What if it is? But at least your lamp's full and you're having an expectation for His return. There are warnings all around us. The lights are flashing as bright as they can. There is a dead end. Matthew 24:37-39: 'But as the days of Noah were, so also will the coming of the Son of Man be. For as in the days before the flood, they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noah entered the ark, and did not know until the flood came and took them away.
